name: Agnes
history: History of isolation and chronic depression since late adolescence. Past difficulties with friendships. Recent breakup preceding a relapse into a depressive episode. History of taking SSRIs and recent medication adjustments following the relapse.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I need to be recognized and compensated by the government to feel secure.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am unable to maintain stability without external validation and support.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of responsibilities and reliance on delusional beliefs for comfort.
situation: Planned a weekend for sewing and catching up on work tasks. Was unable to focus on familiar tasks and spent the day watching television.
auto_thought: The government needs to pay me because they owe me for the years of abuse.
behavior: Avoidance of paying rent and seeking external validation through delusional beliefs.
